overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's urban center. The player moves from a covered sidewalk under an overpass, crosses a busy intersection, and continues through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a medical center, passing futuristic architecture, palm trees, and various NPCs.

events.description: approaching intersection crosswalk, slowing slightly before crossing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane road, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: person in orange outfit standing near the railing, looking at traffic

entered.detail: concrete overpass creating partial cover over the sidewalk
tall pole with traffic signals and yellow cross sign
illuminated advertisement screen showing futuristic graphics
tall building with distinctive red and white horizontal stripes near the top
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a highway overpass on a concrete sidewalk. The camera moves forward past a traffic light pole and digital billboard, with a distinctive striped skyscraper visible in the distance. Vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the left while a few pedestrians are scattered along the path.

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open intersection with full sky visibility
crossing the multi-lane street at the marked crosswalk
entering covered walkway beneath the MedCenter building

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy intersection and entering the covered walkway beneath the MedCenter, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sports car driving through the intersection
pedestrian in yellow jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large multi-story building with red MedCenter signage and cross symbol
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered sidewalk into a bright, open intersection. The player crosses the multi-lane street, passing a futuristic silver car, and approaches the MedCenter building. The scene transitions from the open crosswalk into the shadow of the MedCenter's covered walkway, with the distinctive striped building now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath medical center with landscaped seating

events.description: ground surface changes to distinctive teal-green colored paving tiles
passing landscaped seating area with palm tree planters and benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza beneath the MedCenter, passing pedestrians and palm tree planters on the left

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking together toward the camera

distinctive teal-green colored paved pedestrian walkway
large white planters containing tall palm trees and greenery
white modern benches with people sitting
bright orange safety railings along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the MedCenter structure, the scene features a distinctive teal-green paved walkway lined with palm tree planters on the left. The area is partially covered with fluorescent lighting overhead. The camera passes orange safety railings on the right and benches with seated pedestrians, while the MedCenter signage remains prominent on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with seating areas and digital advertisements

events.description: passing close to a distinctive seated character with yellow mask and purple suit on a bench

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered plaza, passing close to a distinctive NPC with a yellow mask sitting on a bench, and navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: distinctive character with yellow face mask and purple suit sitting on bench, holding a green object
woman in red jacket and white skirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: distinctive seated figure with bright yellow face mask, purple suit, and green accessories
large illuminated digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements on the left wall
futuristic metallic trash receptacle next to the benches

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the covered plaza, passing by benches where a distinctive character with a yellow mask and purple suit sits prominently on the left. The walkway features digital advertisement screens on the left wall and maintains the teal-green flooring. The camera moves past various pedestrians in moderate density, with the space feeling like an indoor-outdoor transit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed urban overpass into a brightly lit, futuristic medical plaza. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a highway, moving past a digital billboard and a distant striped skyscraper while vehicles stream along a multi-lane road. As the camera exits the cover of the overpass, the scene opens into a bright intersection where the player crosses the street past a silver car before entering the shadow of the MedCenter building. The environment then shifts into a covered walkway characterized by teal-green paving and palm tree planters, passing under fluorescent lights and orange safety railings. Finally, the camera glides through the indoor-outdoor transit corridor, passing digital advertisements and a character in a purple suit and yellow mask among a crowd of pedestrians.
